about.title: Who Am I?
about.p1: I am Ritik Ranjan, a B.Tech Computer Science graduate from a village background.
about.p2: Growing up, I saw many students around me struggling with small digital tasks like resizing images, converting PDFs, or filling online forms. These tasks, though simple, cost them ₹50–₹100 at cyber cafes — which is a big amount for economically weaker students.
about.p3: Many of my friends used to ask me to help them, and I always did it for free. That's when I realized — why not build a platform where anyone can do these tasks themselves, easily and for free?
about.mission: Make digital tools accessible to every student without cost.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions from students
faq.a1: Use our Image Compressor tool. Upload your image, set target size to 20KB and click compress. Preview the result before downloading.
faq.q2: How to resize photo for SSC / UPSC forms?
faq.a2: Use the Image Resizer tool. Enter the required dimensions (e.g. 3.5cm × 4.5cm or 200×230 px), upload your photo and download.
faq.q3: How to merge Aadhaar front and back?
faq.a3: Use the ID Card Joiner tool. Upload front and back images separately — they get placed side-by-side on one A4 PDF page.
faq.q4: Is my data safe? Do you store my files?
faq.a4: 100% safe! All processing happens inside your browser itself. Your files are never uploaded to any server. We cannot see your files.
faq.q5: What is the difference between JPG, PNG and WEBP?
faq.a5: JPG is best for photos (smaller size). PNG supports transparency (good for logos). WEBP is a modern format with best compression. Our converter handles all three.
faq.q6: Do I need to create an account to use tools?
faq.a6: No! All tools are completely free and require zero registration. Just open the tool and start working.

footer.tagline: Free tools built with ❤️ for every student.
